15.reason: When ch[i] is '-' but the expansion conditions are not met, the program fails to output the '-' character. An else branch to print ch[i] is missing here.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: When ch[i] is '-' but the expansion conditions are not met, the program fails to print the '-' character. It should print ch[i] in this case.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  // The 'else' is misplaced—it should correspond to the case when expansion conditions are not met, but currently it only handles when ch[i] != '-', and fails to output '-' when expansion conditions fail.

16.reason: // This line prints the current character (which is '-') only when it's not '-', which is contradictory. Also, when expansion conditions fail (e.g., B-e), the '-' should be printed, but the code skips it because the outer 'if(ch[i]=='-')' doesn't have an else to print '-' in failure cases.
